title: Add soft-delete column to Member schema
prompt: Add a `:deleted_at` field of type :utc_datetime to MyApp.Accounts.Member (starting from test_fixtures/soft_delete_missing_scope.ex). Also write a `soft_delete_changeset/1` function that returns a changeset setting deleted_at to the current UTC time. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/member.ex.
tier_rationale: Single column addition with a single helper function. Easy because the pattern is canonical.
